-- This file was generated with rxyals dumper (hookOp is on).

local LocalPlayer = game.Players.LocalPlayer
local Character = LocalPlayer.Character
if Character then -- ran, expr id 1, has an else.
    local GH0ST_HUB____ = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
    GH0ST_HUB____.Name = "GH0ST HUBðŸ›‘"
    GH0ST_HUB____.ResetOnSpawn = true
    GH0ST_HUB____.Parent = LocalPlayer:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")
    local Frame = Instance.new("Frame")
    local UDim2_New = UDim2.new
    Frame.Size = UDim2_New(0, 180, 0, 80)
    Frame.Position = UDim2_New(0.4, 0, 0.4, 0)
    local Color3_FromRGB = Color3.fromRGB
    Frame.BackgroundColor3 = Color3_FromRGB(30, 30, 30)
    Frame.BorderSizePixel = 0
    Frame.Active = true
    Frame.Draggable = true
    Frame.Parent = GH0ST_HUB____
    local TextLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    TextLabel.Size = UDim2_New(0.95, 0, 0.3, 0)
    TextLabel.Position = UDim2_New(0.025, 0, 0.05, 0)
    TextLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    local Enum_Font = Enum.Font
    TextLabel.Font = Enum_Font.GothamBold
    TextLabel.Text = "GH0ST HUBðŸ›‘"
    TextLabel.TextColor3 = Color3_FromRGB(255, 255, 255)
    TextLabel.TextScaled = true
    TextLabel.Parent = Frame
    local TextButton = Instance.new("TextButton")
    TextButton.Size = UDim2_New(0.9, 0, 0.5, 0)
    TextButton.Position = UDim2_New(0.05, 0, 0.4, 0)
    TextButton.BackgroundColor3 = Color3_FromRGB(220, 50, 50)
    TextButton.BorderSizePixel = 0
    TextButton.Font = Enum_Font.GothamBold
    TextButton.Text = "No Animation = OFF"
    TextButton.TextColor3 = Color3_FromRGB(255, 255, 255)
    TextButton.TextScaled = true
    TextButton.Parent = Frame
    local Connection
    Connection = TextButton.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function(p1_0)
        TextButton.Text = "No Animation = ON"
        local Humanoid = Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
        if not Humanoid then -- didnt run, expr id 2, has an else.
        else
            for i, v in ipairs(Humanoid:GetPlayingAnimationTracks()) do
            end
            if not i then -- didnt run, expr id 3, has an else.
            else
                v:Stop()
            end
        end
        local Animator = Humanoid:FindFirstChildOfClass("Animator")
        if Animator then -- ran, expr id 4, has an else.
            Animator:Destroy()
        end
    end)
    local Connection_2
    Connection_2 = game:GetService("RunService").Heartbeat:Connect(function(DeltaTime, p2_0, p3_0, p4_0) -- args: DeltaTime_2
        local Humanoid_2 = Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
        if not Humanoid_2 then -- didnt run, expr id 5, has an else.
        else
            for i_2, v_2 in ipairs(Humanoid_2:GetPlayingAnimationTracks()) do
            end
            if not i_2 then -- didnt run, expr id 6, has an else.
            else
                v_2:Stop()
            end
        end
        local Animator_2 = Humanoid_2:FindFirstChildOfClass("Animator")
        if Animator_2 then -- ran, expr id 7, has an else.
            Animator_2:Destroy()
        end
    end)
    local Connection_3
    Connection_3 = LocalPlayer.CharacterAdded:Connect(function(Character_2, p2_0, p3_0, p4_0) -- args: Character_3
        task.wait(1)
        local Humanoid_3 = Character_2:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
        if not Humanoid_3 then -- didnt run, expr id 8, has an else.
        else
            for i_3, v_3 in ipairs(Humanoid_3:GetPlayingAnimationTracks()) do
            end
            if not i_3 then -- didnt run, expr id 9, has an else.
            else
                v_3:Stop()
            end
        end
        local Animator_3 = Humanoid_3:FindFirstChildOfClass("Animator")
        if Animator_3 then -- ran, expr id 10, has an else.
            Animator_3:Destroy()
        end
    end)
end
